description_long: This upright piano features a rich, dark wood finish with a classic rectangular form and a full keyboard of white and black keys. The front panel above the keys is smooth and unadorned, with subtle wood grain visible throughout. Two pedals are located at the base, and the piano stands on four sturdy legs. The top lid is closed, giving the instrument a solid, monolithic appearance from the back. The keyboard is standard, with evenly spaced keys and no visible missing or non-standard elements. The piano is accompanied by a double bass and a violin, both also in a matching wood finish, suggesting a cohesive ensemble.
description: A dark wood upright piano with a full keyboard, two pedals, and a closed top lid, accompanied by a double bass and violin. The piano has a classic, polished appearance and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the piano's depth, closed lid, and the profile of the double bass behind it.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full keyboard, two pedals, and the front faces of the double bass and violin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the keyboard's length and the side profiles of the string instruments.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid wood back of the piano and the backs of the double bass and violin.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement, no missing or non-standard keys.
